TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_alang_Tpiray, title = alang_Tpiray, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/alang_Tpiray} }

S.FORM: alang Tpiray : alang na Tpiray ga nya skura te llow na skura te tltuw pu'ing. knhulan na ita Tayal hiya ga kahul ta bih na Pinsbkan, ro hkngyan skura te tltuw, karow ro krayas rgyax "b'bu bayu" kwara. ryax haca ga knaki bih alang lela kwara cyoli na llyung Klesan, ro mpuw payat kwara alang cnrux kya. laney ta skal cikey cyu inu alang Tayal kwara bih llyung Klesan kya.

alang Tpiray : alang na Tpiray ga nya skura te llow na skura te tltuw pu'ing. knhulan na ita Tayal hiya ga kahul ta bih na Pinsbkan, ro hkngyan skura te tltuw, karow ro krayas rgyax "b'bu bayu" kwara. ryax haca ga knaki bih alang lela kwara cyoli na llyung Klesan, ro mpuw payat kwara alang cnrux kya. laney ta skal cikey cyu inu alang Tayal kwara bih llyung Klesan kya.
S.PHON: alaŋ tpiraj : alaŋ na tpiraj ɣa nja s~ɕkura te llow na s~ɕkura te tltuw puʔiŋ. knħulan na ita tajal ħija ɣa kaħul ta βiħ na pins~ɕβkan, ro ħkŋjan s~ɕkura te tltuw, karow ro krajas~ɕ rɣjax "βʔβu βaju" kwara. rjax ħaʦ~ʨa ɣa knaki βiħ alaŋ lela kwara ʦ~ʨjoli na lljuŋ kles~ɕan, ro mpuw pajat kwara alaŋ ʦ~ʨnrux kja. lanej ta s~ɕkal ʦ~ʨikej ʦ~ʨju inu alaŋ tajal kwara βiħ lljuŋ kles~ɕan kja.
